name: @sttronn/pi-sheets
description_en: Spreadsheet-editing skill for agentic coding hosts (Claude Code, Codex, Pi). openpyxl + formualizer + a unified CLI; works as a portable skill bundle or as a pi extension.
description_zh: 代理式编码主机（Claude Code、Codex、Pi）的电子表格编辑技能。openpyxl + formualizer + 统一的 CLI；可作为便携式技能包或 pi 扩展使用
